commit_message: Introduce job queues for source/sink modules Introduce job queues for source/sink modules This update introduces a programmable-length FIFO job queue to the source and sink modules. The queue allows jobs to be stored and processed sequentially, enabling autonomous job management. Each module can now execute jobs without direct control, improving flexibility in job handling.
